$comment: Workflows to create on the stack + transition policy for existing entries. The seeder is idempotent: a workflow whose `name` already exists is skipped (no update). Stage UIDs auto-derive from name (slug) unless explicitly set.

publishingRules.$comment: Auto-publish to the default environment when an entry hits the Approved stage. Approvers empty — no four-eye principle.

$transitionPolicyComment: After creating workflows, the seeder iterates entries in each workflow's content types and assigns stages. Each entry picks a walk PATTERN by weight: linear (full walk), skip (jump first→last), rework (back-and-forth), partialStall (stop at middle), firstOnly. Each transition is a separate API call. The legacy `distribution` shape (finish/stallMiddle/firstOnly) is auto-converted to `patterns` for backwards compat.
